pageContext.name: Be@rbrick The Rolling Stones Lips & Tongue (Black Chrome Version) 1000%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick The Rolling Stones Lips & Tongue (Black Chrome Version) 1000% Collectible Figure!  This figure stands at 27.55' tall and features an all-over black chrome paint with one of the most iconic logos from one of the most popular bands known to man, The Rolling Stones! You can always spot the logo of a mouth with red lips and tongue sticking out from miles away.  Don't miss your chance to add this Be@rbrick collectible figure to your collection today!
